title: Creating a folder through Monday API
excerpt: We want to create a folder in Monday so we can organise Monday boards. Does the API provide this capability to create folders?

posts.author: sudewa (Sudewa Nawarathna)
posts.cookedHtml: We want to create a folder in Monday so we can organise Monday boards. Does the API provide this capability to create folders?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately the API does not have any support for folders.

posts.author: sudewa (Sudewa Nawarathna)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks. We also requested Monday R&D team via support on this limitation. Hope Monday will improve this.

posts.author: RonTuretzky (Ron Turetzky)
posts.cookedHtml:
There’s a workaround you could do here

You can use the API to create a board using a template ID (I think there are templates that will create multiple boards, and because they do they put them into a folder)

Then lets say if the template creates 3 boards you could scan for the 3 recently created boards (or fetch before board creation and delete the added boards by ID) and then you would have a folder.

Of course you couldnt name the folder or move boards into it so I don’t know if this is of any use actually

posts.author: gus.furtado (Gustavo Furtado (A-Players Brazil))
posts.cookedHtml: @RonTuretzky Wow, that’s actually a great workaround! Thank you!

posts.author: Aurelien (Aurelien)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates on this, stuck on this problem. Or do I need to get a revolt to get this feature?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @basdebruin !

As Bas mentioned, you can now create folders via API

Cheers,
Matias
